sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String);
SELECT id, concatWithSeparatorAssumeInjective('-', name) AS separated_name FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET name = concatWithSeparatorAssumeInjective(' ', name, 'Smith') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, concatWithSeparatorAssumeInjective('; ', name) AS full_name FROM test_table GROUP BY full_name;
